entity1.label: AISystem

entity1.definition: An AI system that poses a high risk to rights and safety.

entity1.label: hasObligation
entity1.definition: Indicates an obligation associated with an entity.

entity2.label: has Obligation
entity2.definition: Denotes an obligation that an entity must fulfill.

entity1.label: hasCategory
